description: Every SENTENCE Stage 4 emits into scorecards.json, declared as method data rather than typed into the code that emits it. Method files are hashed into method_file_sha256 and therefore into scorecard_set_id, so a sentence declared here cannot be rewritten in a release without moving the identity of that release. A sentence that lives only in the emitter is bound by nothing: a resealed scorecards.json could invert 'CNS MPO >= 4 does not mean the drug is brain-penetrant' and every hash would still agree. That is the hole this file closes.

cns_mpo.interpretation_guard: CNS-MPO is a physicochemical design-space desirability score (Wager 2010). It is not measured brain permeability, not a probability of CNS exposure, and not an NEBPI class. It cannot satisfy any NEBPI Part-II branch.

transporters.interpretation_guard: Efflux liability is suggestive of restricted CNS exposure; it is not a measurement of brain exposure and cannot satisfy an NEBPI branch. Transporter observations are reported per assay, species and biological system, and are never collapsed into a boolean.
transporters.unqualified_boolean_note: Deliberately null. A transporter interaction is qualified by assay, species and biological system; 'is a P-gp substrate: true' discards exactly the qualifications that make the observation interpretable.
transporters._required_note: The transporters Stage 4 expects an observation for. Declared as method data: when NO transporter evidence exists, these names are the only thing the release says about them, and a name that lives only in the emitter is bound by nothing.

set_level.ordering_note: Candidates are listed side by side in a non-evaluative order. Stage 4 does not rank.
set_level.lanes_are_independent: delivery, cns_mpo, transporters, exposure, nebpi and safety are separate lanes. There is no combined score, and none is derivable from this document.
set_level.calculator_mixing_none: All candidates used the same calculator for each property.
set_level.calculator_mixing_present: Per-candidate scores remain valid. Cross-candidate comparison of the listed properties is explicitly disclaimed because the values come from different calculators.

provenance_chain.cns_mpo_total_note: A transform of the six component rows above; it has no source of its own.
provenance_chain.nebpi_class_note: Derived from the NEBPI observation rows; each of those rows carries its own source hash.
provenance_chain.safety_no_source_transform: no source: state is about the search, not the drug

branch_requirements.pk_therapeutic_in_neb: PK with therapeutic levels in NEB (accounting for potency)
branch_requirements.insufficiently_permeable::pk_low_in_neb: Low PK levels in NEB (accounting for potency)
branch_requirements.insufficiently_permeable::no_relevant_pd: No relevant PD in NEB (observed absent by an adequate assessment)
branch_requirements.insufficiently_permeable::no_radiographi: No radiographic response in NEB (observed absent by an adequate assessment)
branch_requirements.impermeable::pk_little_to_none_in_neb: Little to no drug in NEB (accounting for potency)
branch_requirements.impermeable::no_relevant_pd_in_neb: No relevant PD in NEB (observed absent by an adequate assessment)
branch_requirements.impermeable::no_radiographic_response_in: No radiographic response in NEB (observed absent by an adequate assessment)

counterfactual.hard_rule: Absent or unknown evidence is never 'impermeable'.
counterfactual.would_lose_class_if: the qualifying positive branch (therapeutic PK in NEB, relevant PD in NEB, or radiographic response in NEB) were retracted
to_reach_sufficiently_permeable_any_one_: observe therapeutic PK in NEB with a bound MEC/potency context
observe a relevant PD effect in NEB
observe a radiographic response in NEB
to_reach_insufficiently_permeable_all_of: observe LOW PK in NEB (below MEC, with potency context)
adequately assess PD in NEB and observe none
adequately assess radiographic response in NEB and observe none
to_reach_impermeable_all_of: observe LITTLE-TO-NO drug in NEB (with potency context)
adequately assess PD in NEB and observe none
adequately assess radiographic response in NEB and observe none

nebpi._codes_not_prose: Everything below is a CODE, not a sentence. The interpolated explanations Stage 4 used to emit here (blocking_reason, negative_classes_blocked_because, context_caveats) were free prose that nothing could reconstruct and nothing could bind — a resealed release could rewrite the reason a branch failed while the machine state beside it stayed honest. They are typed codes now, and the sentence for each lives in METHODS.md.

branch_blocking_codes.pk_level_is_not_the_required_level: the derived PK level is not the level this branch requires
branch_blocking_codes.pk_not_derivable: no PK level could be derived (see pk_blocked_code)
branch_blocking_codes.pk_has_no_potency_context: PK was measured but no MEC/potency context binds it (Table 2 footnote a)
branch_blocking_codes.state_is_not_observed_present: the criterion was not observed present
branch_blocking_codes.state_is_not_observed_absent: the criterion was not observed absent by an adequate assessment
branch_blocking_codes.absence_claim_inadequate: an absence was claimed but no adequate assessment looked for it
branch_blocking_codes.conflicting_observations: two distinct observations of this criterion disagree

context_caveat_codes.context_incomplete: NEBPI is context-dependent; part of the route/formulation/dose/schedule/tumour context is missing
context_caveat_codes.no_potency_context: no MEC/potency record binds the PK observations in this context

negative_class_blocker_codes.pk_not_measured_in_neb: no PK was measured in non-enhancing brain
negative_class_blocker_codes.pd_absence_not_established: 'No relevant PD in NEB' is not established
negative_class_blocker_codes.radiographic_absence_not_established: 'No radiographic response in NEB' is not established

eligibility._codes_not_prose: production_eligible carries a reason_code only. The sentence it used to carry was free prose bound by nothing; the code IS reconstructed by the independent verifier (rebuild_eligibility), and the sentence for each code is in METHODS.md.

stage3_contract_status.internal_form_note: Stage3DrugCandidateSet is the Stage-4-internal normalized form, NOT Stage 3's wire format. Stage 3's real schema is spot.stage03_drug_annotation.v1.
stage3_contract_status.assessment_is_not_promotion: A Stage-4 assessment computes PK/safety properties. It is not biological promotion and not a recommendation.
stage3_contract_status.stage3_freeze_note: Stage 3 is schema-corrected but NOT frozen. Stage 4 is pinned to the r5 contract and refuses anything else.

schema_ids._note: The schema_id Stage 4 stamps on each document. Declared here so the id a reader sees is bound into the release's identity like everything else.

selection.reason_fixture_pass: Fixture pass. Stage 4 is an evidence engine, not a ranker: a selection would require real, independently reviewed public-source evidence, and none of the evidence in this run is real. No drug is asserted to be safe, brain-permeable, NEBPI-classified or clinically suitable.
selection.basis_when_enabled: explicit human review of the separate evidence lanes
selection.not_basis_when_enabled: any composite or automated score — Stage 4 does not compute one

safety._note: The text a reader sees beside a safety finding. Rewriting `no_evidence_found` to read like a clean bill of health is the most dangerous edit available on a release, so it is method data, hashed into the id, and re-read cell-for-cell by verifier/derived.py.

evidence_state_display.label_supported: Stated in the cited section of the cited label version.
evidence_state_display.signal_only: Spontaneous-report / disproportionality signal only. Hypothesis-generating. Cannot establish incidence, causality, safety or a contraindication.
evidence_state_display.no_evidence_found: The named sources were searched and returned nothing for this item. This is a statement about the search, NOT a finding of safety. Absence of evidence is not evidence of absence.
evidence_state_display.not_evaluated: Not searched in any source. Nothing is known either way.

exposure._codes_not_prose: The margin caveats are CODES. The sentence for each is here and in METHODS.md; a sentence emitted from the engine would be bound by nothing, and a resealed release could rewrite 'CSF is not non-enhancing brain' into its opposite.

caveat_codes.csf_is_not_non_enhancing_brain: CSF is not non-enhancing brain: the blood-CSF barrier is more permeable than the BBB (Grossman 2026). A CSF margin says nothing about NEB exposure and cannot satisfy an NEBPI branch.
caveat_codes.measured_in_enhancing_tissue: Measured in contrast-enhancing tissue, where the BBB is disrupted. Not NEB evidence.
caveat_codes.potency_applied_via_sourced_relevance_li: The potency was measured in a different tumour context and applied here via a sourced relevance link.

delivery._codes_not_prose: A delivery decision Stage 4 GENERATED carries a reason_code and no sentence. A rationale that IS present came from the input assignment and is bound by the evidence-input digest.
